title: Stand Up India Scheme
meta_description: Stand Up India provides bank loans from ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore for SC/ST and women entrepreneurs to start new businesses.

hero.one_liner: Bank loans from ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore for SC/ST and women entrepreneurs for greenfield (new) enterprises

what_is_it: Stand Up India scheme launched on 5 April 2016 provides bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore to SC/ST and women entrepreneurs for setting up new (greenfield) enterprises in manufacturing, services, or trading sectors.

Each bank branch must give at least one loan to an SC/ST borrower and one loan to a woman borrower under this scheme. The loan covers up to 75% of the project cost, and the entrepreneur must bring at least 25% as their own contribution. The scheme is facilitated through the Stand Up India portal (standupmitra.in) which connects entrepreneurs with bank branches.

eligibility.label: Who can apply
eligibility.value: SC/ST entrepreneurs OR women entrepreneurs (18+ years)

eligibility.label: Enterprise type
eligibility.value: Must be a NEW (greenfield) enterprise — not expansion of existing business

eligibility.label: Own contribution
eligibility.value: Minimum 25% of project cost from the entrepreneur

eligibility.label: Borrower condition
eligibility.value: Must not be in default to any bank/financial institution

how_to_apply.title: Register on standupmitra.in
how_to_apply.description: Create an account, fill your profile with personal and business details.

how_to_apply.title: Submit business plan
how_to_apply.description: Upload a project report detailing your business idea, investment needed, and expected returns.

how_to_apply.title: Get connected to a bank branch
how_to_apply.description: The portal connects you with the nearest bank branch. Visit the branch with your documents.

how_to_apply.title: Loan sanction
how_to_apply.description: Bank evaluates your project. Loan of ₹10L to ₹1Cr sanctioned with repayment period up to 7 years including moratorium of up to 18 months.

important_alert.text: This is specifically for NEW businesses. If you already have a running business and want to expand, this scheme does not apply. Look at PM Mudra Yojana instead.

faqs.question: Can a general category woman apply?
faqs.answer: Yes. ALL women (regardless of caste category) are eligible. SC/ST men are also eligible. General/OBC category men are not eligible.

faqs.question: What's the interest rate?
faqs.answer: Interest rate is the lowest applicable rate of the bank for that category. There is no specific subsidized rate, but banks are expected to offer competitive terms.

faqs.question: Can two people apply jointly?
faqs.answer: Yes. At least 51% of the shareholding/stake must be held by an SC/ST or woman entrepreneur.

faqs.question: What if the bank refuses my application?
faqs.answer: Register your complaint on standupmitra.in. Each bank branch is mandated to approve at least 2 Stand Up India loans (one SC/ST + one woman). SIDBI also provides handholding support.
